parsed_output.justification: The Seer’s statement is the strongest evidence: "Alvin: I straight up looked at his card and it was the werewolf card" clearly indicates that the card Alvin looked at was Justin’s. Since No swaps involving Justin are shown in the transcript, this points to Justin holding a Werewolf at the end of the night. No other player’s role was ever confirmed as werewolf, and any talk of a second werewolf remains speculative at best.
